name: Isikali se-AVPU
description: Uvavanyo olukhawulezayo lwenqanaba lesi-4. Ngokukhawuleza kune-GCS yovavanyo lokuqala.
instructions: Vavanya inqanaba eliphezulu lempendulo isigulane esibonisa.

scoring.label: Isilumkiso
scoring.description: Isigulana sivukile, siyazi, kwaye siphendula ngokuqhelekileyo

scoring.label: Iintlungu
scoring.description: Isigulana siphendula kuphela kwizivuseleli ezibuhlungu (i-rab yangaphandle, uxinzelelo lwebhedi yeenzipho)

scoring.label: Ukungaphenduli
scoring.description: Akukho mpendulo kuyo nayiphi na i-stimuli -- ungenelelo olukhawulezileyo lomoya ofunekayo

interpretation.triage: Okubalulekileyo -- indlela yomoya esemngciphekweni, i-GCS iqhelekile <= 8
Ngoko nangoko -- lawula indlela yomoya ngoku
